description:
**Source:** CTO report P2-010 (P2 — MEDIUM, fix within 60 days)
**Assigned to Jake for review before agent pickup.**

**Problem:** HELiXiR has semantic-release configured but no visible CHANGELOG.md in the repo root. Users and contributors cannot easily see what changed between versions.

**Action:**
1. Verify semantic-release is configured to generate CHANGELOG.md (check `.releaserc` or `release.config.js`)
2. If `@semantic-release/changelog` plugin is not present, add it
3. Run a release cycle to generate the initial CHANGELOG
4. Ensure CHANGELOG.md is committed and visible in repo root

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md exists at repo root
- [ ] It contains entries for recent releases
- [ ] Future releases automatically update it via semantic-release
title: P2-010: Generate HELiXiR CHANGELOG.md

statusHistory.reason: CHANGELOG.md already exists — generated by changesets migration and published with v0.2.0
